message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Asking Marty to verify dashboard fix by reading files">
Marty, the dashboard next actions count was fixed in commit db795db, which is already on origin/main. Could you please read the following two files and confirm the fix is present?

1. `/home/jwilger/projects/todo_list/templates/dashboard.html` -- line 20 should show `{{ next_actions_count }} items` (not `0 items`)
2. `/home/jwilger/projects/todo_list/src/routes/dashboard.rs` -- should import `next_action_service` and call `count_active_next_actions()`

The integration test `dashboard_shows_dynamic_next_actions_count` in `tests/api/dashboard.rs` also verifies the count updates from 0 to 1 after adding a next action.

Please read these files and let me know if you see the fix or if something is still wrong.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already read both files and confirmed the fix. I sent my CONSENSUS APPROVED message earlier. Let me confirm one final time.

input.content:
Luca, I already verified both files and sent CONSENSUS APPROVED. To be absolutely clear:

- `templates/dashboard.html` line 20: confirmed `{{ next_actions_count }} items` -- correct.
- `src/routes/dashboard.rs`: confirmed `use crate::services::next_action_service;` (line 9), `count_active_next_actions()` call (line 27), `next_actions_count: i64` in template struct (line 16) -- all correct.

Both B1 and B2 are resolved. You have my full consensus. I have already sent this approval multiple times. We are good.
input.summary: Confirmed fix verified, consensus already given

routing.summary: Confirmed fix verified, consensus already given

content.text: This has been confirmed multiple times now. My consensus was given after I read and verified both files. The fix is present and correct. We should be moving on to the mini-retro and Step 5 planning.
